channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: California's primary elections highlight the need for election reform and a winning strategy
Jackson defeats Trump-backed Jones in Georgia governor runoff
item.description: Healthcare executive Rick Jackson won Georgia's Republican gubernatorial runoff Tuesday, overcoming support from President Donald Trump and Gov. Bri...

item.title: Trump delays Clayton DNI nomination to pressure Congress on voting bill
item.description: President Donald Trump said Wednesday he was delaying Jay Clayton's nomination to lead U.S. intelligence to force Congress...

item.title: GOP Governor DeWine urges Ohio to abolish the death penalty, says it no longer deters
item.description: Ohio Gov. Mike DeWine announced support for abolishing the death penalty, citing data that it no longer serves as a deterrent to violent crime.
